theme: How a pharma company used incentive travel to solve a retention crisis

linkedin.text:
A pharma company was losing 28% of its sales force a year. One trip cut it to 11%.

The brief: a leading Israeli pharma firm was bleeding field reps. Salary increases had plateaued. The pipeline was damaged. HR was out of moves.

Our diagnosis: the team felt invisible. Hitting targets, never celebrated. Recognition was private. Achievement was silent.

Our solution: 4 days in Athens for the top 40 — a celebration, not a vacation.
→ Private Acropolis sunset dinner (closed just for them)
→ Yacht cruise with a team challenge
→ Awards ceremony on a boutique rooftop
→ CEO flew in to thank each winner personally

12 months later:
📉 Turnover: 28% → 11%
📈 Team performance: +23%
💰 Cost: ₪180,000 → retention savings: ₪1,200,000+

Sometimes the most expensive thing you can do is not invest in your people.

📅 Book a free 30-minute call and we'll design a retention-focused program for your team.

#EmployeeEngagement #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
A pharma company was losing more than a quarter of its sales team every year, and raises had stopped working. 🎯

When we dug in, the problem wasn't money. The team was hitting every target and being celebrated for none of it. Recognition was silent.

So we took the top 40 to Athens for four days. A private sunset dinner at the Acropolis. A yacht challenge. A rooftop awards ceremony where the CEO flew in and thanked each one personally.

Twelve months later, turnover had dropped from 28% to 11% and performance was up 23%. A ₪180k trip protected over ₪1.2M in talent.

Sometimes the most expensive thing you can do is not invest in your people.

Facing churn on your team? Send us a message and we'll talk it through. 💬
